About me

Who I am

I'm Nikitha, an AI & Data Science engineer from Hyderabad with a strong foundation in machine learning, NLP, and full-stack web development. I completed my B.E. with an impressive 80% CGPA in 2026.

What sets me apart: I was selected for DRDO internships in two consecutive years — a rare achievement — where I shipped real, production-deployed systems used by government researchers, not just toy projects.

I'm certified by IBM, IIT Bombay, and Deloitte, and I hold strong fundamentals in DSA, OOP, and computer science. I'm looking for opportunities in AI, Data Science, or Software Development where I can make a meaningful impact from Day 1.

DRDL, DRDO — Hyderabad

Projects

Things I've built

👗
AI Fashion Assistant
NLP chatbot that applies seasonal colour theory & body-type analysis to generate personalised outfit recommendations. End-to-end AI pipeline from user input through NLP processing and image analysis to intelligent output.
Python NLP ML HTML/CSS Major Project
💳
Credit Card Fraud Detection
Built a fraud detection model on highly imbalanced data using SMOTE, advanced feature engineering, and a comparison of Random Forest vs XGBoost classifiers for maximum detection accuracy.
Python Scikit-learn EDA SMOTE XGBoost
🎙️
Speech-to-Text Web Application
Full-stack Speech-to-Text system built in Python + AngularJS and deployed live at DRDO — a government research facility. Converts spoken audio into text in real time and auto-generates formatted meeting minutes with one-click Word export via REST API, drastically cutting manual documentation effort.
Python AngularJS REST API NLP Word Export 🏛 Deployed @ DRDO
